---
title: "Animation"
description-meta: "Animation of ALHIC1901 228_4 water isotope dip adjustment"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
#title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---


<!-- Include academic icons or buttons
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}} -->

## Water Isotope Dip-Adjustment Animation

This video shows the allignment of ALHIC1901 section 228_4 water isotopes with dip adjustment

{{< video files/media/iso_movie.mp4 >}}


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
